title: Can We Handle the Truth?
summary: A brief discussion exploring the implications of non-human intelligence interacting with humanity and questioning whether humans are prepared to accept they may not be at the top of the consciousness hierarchy. The conversation challenges viewers to consider fundamental shifts in understanding reality.

acronyms.definition: Intelligence that is not of human origin, potentially interacting with humanity

key_claims.claim: Non-human intelligence has been interacting with humanity
There is something that is not human that is interacting with us in some fashion
Humans may not be at the top of the food chain or apex consciousness
